Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he was okay with the matter as presented, that he has everyone's address and has given notice, and that there was no objection. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

There being no objection, the Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
